name: Iopamidol
description: Iopamidol is a contrast agent developed by Bracco with nonionic, low-osmolar properties.

interactions.name: Metformin
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Iopamidol is combined with Metformin.

interactions.name: Aldesleukin
interactions.description: The risk of a hypersensitivity reaction to Iopamidol is increased when it is combined with Aldesleukin.
